title: Crinum massaianum
taxonomy: Crinum massaianum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. It is a bulbous perennial native to Africa. The classification of Crinum massaianum is further divided into the genus Crinum and the subfamily Amaryllidoideae. Crinum massaianum is closely related to other species within the Crinum genus and shares similarities with other Amaryllidaceae family members. The taxonomic classification of Crinum massaianum is subject to ongoing research and updates in botanical nomenclature.
